holdings.infoBox: BATT is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 7.41%, Tesla at 6.85%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 6.43%, Freeport-McMoRan at 5.59%, and BYD Co Ltd Class H at 4.84%.

overview.description: The Amplify Lithium & Battery Technology ETF (BATT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index that invests in global advanced battery material companies such as those that mine or produce lithium, cobalt, nickel, manganese, and graphite. BATT was launched on Jun 6, 2018 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
